tv.generator-info-name: Processned by Open-EPG Visual Processor v1.0

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: Film nan brilian ini merupakan kisah kelanjutan tentang dua generasi penerus keluarga mafia Corleone. Dibintangi oleh Al Pacino dan Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4
programme.desc: Alex mengalami kejadian aneh setelah bertemu Robbie, putra tetangganya. Hidupnya berubah menjadi mimpi buruk ketika satu per satu orang-orang yang disayanginya dibunuh.

programme.title: Alarum
programme.desc: Dua mata-mata nakal keluar dari jaringan, menikah, dan diserang di kabin terpencil tempat persembunyian mereka oleh berbagai agen intelijen yang mencari hard drive curian.

programme.title: Life Support
programme.desc: Kisah seorang wanita HIV-positif yang mempelajari pelajaran cinta dan kekuatan dengan membantu orang lain.

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan
programme.desc: Bertahun-tahun setelah Tarzan meninggalkan hutan, ia diundang kembali untuk bertugas sebagai utusan perdagangan Parlemen, tanpa menyadari bahwa ia adalah pion dalam rencana pembunuhan.

programme.title: Lady in the Water
programme.desc: Cleveland Heep, seorang pengawas gedung apartemen, menyelamatkan seseorang yang ia kira adalah seorang wanita muda dari kolam renang yang ia rawat. Ketika ia mengetahui bahwa wanita itu sebenarnya adalah tokoh dari dongeng pengantar tidur yang sedang berusaha kembali ke rumahnya, ia bekerja sama dengan para penghuninya untuk melindungi teman barunya itu dari makhluk-makhluk yang bertekad untuk menahannya di dunia kita.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: Seorang Marsekal AS yang tangguh membantu seorang wanita muda keras kepala untuk melacak pembunuh ayahnya.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: Film nan brilian ini merupakan kisah kelanjutan tentang dua generasi penerus keluarga mafia Corleone. Dibintangi oleh Al Pacino dan Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Indictment: The McMartin Trial
programme.desc: Drama berdasarkan fakta yang berdasarkan persidangan terpanjang dan termahal dalam sejarah Amerika yang berakhir tanpa satu pun hukuman.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set, Ep. 1164
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Hollywood on Set menyambangi balik layar tiga film yang sedang diproduksi, menampilkan wawancara dengan para aktor dan pembuat film.

programme.title: Hostile Waters
programme.desc: Ketika kapal selam nuklir Rusia bertabrakan dengan kapal selam Amerika, kedua kapten harus bekerja sama untuk mencegah kehancuran nuklir.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Rachel McAdams dan Harrison Ford berperan dalam film komedi romantis yang berlatar di dunia acara televisi pagi hari yang lucu dan kacau.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Karena curiga tetangga mereka yang penyendiri adalah pembunuh berantai, tiga penyewa di sebuah gedung membobol apartemennya dan menemukan harta karun tersembunyi dalam karya seni curian. Penemuan mereka segera berubah menjadi mimpi buruk yang nyata saat mereka terjerat dalam permainan bertahan hidup yang sadis, di mana setiap sudut menyembunyikan kengerian baru.

programme.title: The Gallows
programme.desc: Sekelompok siswa mengetahui bahwa beberapa hal lebih baik dibiarkan saja saat mereka mencoba menghidupkan kembali sebuah produksi untuk menghormati seorang aktor yang meninggal selama pertunjukan sekolah.

programme.title: The Gallows
programme.desc: Sekelompok siswa mengetahui bahwa beberapa hal lebih baik dibiarkan saja saat mereka mencoba menghidupkan kembali sebuah produksi untuk menghormati seorang aktor yang meninggal selama pertunjukan sekolah.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: Kisah ini mengikuti sebuah keluarga Amerika yang mengunjungi keluarga Inggris yang mereka temui saat berlibur.

programme.title: Spell
programme.desc: Seorang pria mendarat darurat di pedesaan Appalachia dan terbangun di loteng seorang praktisi Hoodoo tradisional. Ia mati-matian berusaha melepaskan diri dari sihir gelapnya.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Sekelompok remaja pergi ke Danau Crystal, daerah kekuasaan seorang pembunuh berbahaya, dan mereka diserang secara brutal oleh si pembunuh.

programme.title: Path to War
programme.desc: Presiden Johnson dan tim kebijakan luar negerinya berjuang dengan keputusan untuk mengakhiri perang Vietnam dalam film HBO Original ini.

programme.title: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: Tahun-tahun Winston Churchill yang liar sebelum Perang Dunia II, ketika hanya dia yang dapat melihat ancaman yang ditimbulkan Adolf Hitler dan Jerman yang dipersenjatai kembali terhadap Eropa.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret Maverick, yang membutuhkan uang untuk turnamen poker, menghadapi berbagai kesialan dan tantangan lucu, termasuk seorang pencuri wanita yang menawan.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Dipicu oleh kembalinya keyakinannya pada kemanusiaan dan terinspirasi oleh tindakan tanpa pamrih Superman, Bruce Wayne meminta bantuan sekutu barunya, Diana Prince, untuk menghadapi musuh yang lebih besar.

programme.title: Indictment: The McMartin Trial
programme.desc: Drama berdasarkan fakta yang berdasarkan persidangan terpanjang dan termahal dalam sejarah Amerika yang berakhir tanpa satu pun hukuman.

programme.title: Æon Flux
programme.desc: Aeon Flux adalah harapan terakhir para pemberontak untuk menggulingkan suatu masyarakat nan sempurna namun opresif. Akan tetapi saat bertugas, ia menyingkap banyak rahasia yang dapat mengubah masa depan dunia.

programme.title: King Kong
programme.desc: Kisah ikonik tentang kera raksasa yang mengalami nasib tragis setelah ia ditangkap di alam liar dan dibawa ke peradaban.

programme.title: King Kong
programme.desc: Kisah ikonik tentang kera raksasa yang mengalami nasib tragis setelah ia ditangkap di alam liar dan dibawa ke peradaban.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Kisah keluarga Blake yang pindah ke rumah masa kecil Blake di Oregon setelah kematian ayahnya. Di sana, mereka mengalami teror dari makhluk misterius yang ternyata adalah manusia serigala.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Marked Ones
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang menjadi target dari sesosok iblis nan jahat, harus menemukan tujuan sesungguhnya dari makhluk tersebut sebelum dirinya dikontrol sepenuhnya oleh makhluk itu.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: Mad Max terjerat dalam perang jalan beroktan tinggi dengan sekelompok pemberontak yang melarikan diri dari seorang panglima perang nan kejam.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret Maverick, yang membutuhkan uang untuk turnamen poker, menghadapi berbagai kesialan dan tantangan lucu, termasuk seorang pencuri wanita yang menawan.

programme.title: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Setelah ditinggalkan dalam sebuah insiden, Xander Cage diam-diam kembali menjalankan suatu tugas baru nan sulit dengan atasannya Augustus Gibbons.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set, Ep. 1165
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Hollywood on Set menyambangi balik layar tiga film yang sedang diproduksi, menampilkan wawancara dengan para aktor dan pembuat film.

programme.title: Reminiscence
programme.desc: Nick Bannister, seorang penyelidik swasta yang ahli dalam bidang psikologi, menjelajahi dunia masa lalu yang memikat ketika hidupnya berubah karena klien barunya, Mae.

programme.title: Pu-239
programme.desc: Seorang pekerja di pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir Rusia mencuri sejumlah kecil plutonium tingkat senjata dan mencoba menjualnya di pasar gelap Moskow.

programme.title: King Kong
programme.desc: Kisah ikonik tentang kera raksasa yang mengalami nasib tragis setelah ia ditangkap di alam liar dan dibawa ke peradaban.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Sekelompok ilmuwan, tentara, dan petualang menjelajahi pulau mistis yang belum dipetakan, tempat mereka memicu pertempuran pamungkas antara manusia dan alam.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: Deckard Shaw berusaha membalas dendam terhadap Dominic Toretto dan keluarganya atas saudaranya yang koma.

(1Day 1K-culture) is a daily series of cultural programs designed to bring viewers closer to the everyday cultures of Korea. Fishing In The MuseumFocusing on the collection of the National Folk Museum of Korea, this program seeks to uncover the stories hidden within traditional fishing tools; it also aims to break down the boundaries of the museum and bringing these traditional fishing gears to life by visiting the actual sites where they were once used. AI Headline NewsAI Headline News delivers the latest global updates focusing on advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) and its impact across different sectors Korea Travelogue 5A trip to find the hidden secrets of Korea. A live on-the-scene documentary that captures stories of Korea. The Grand Heritage K-ASMRThe Grand Heritage presents the historical value and hidden stories of Koreas world-famous cultural heritage in an aesthetic format helping our global viewers get a better understanding of Koreas cultural assets. The Grand Heritage Four SeasonsThe Grand Heritage presents the historical value and hidden stories of Koreas world-famous cultural heritage in an aesthetic format helping our global viewers get a better understanding of Koreas cultural assets. Press PerspectivePress Perspective provides an in-depth look at current events and news issues from a variety of viewpoints. Trip In KoreaTrip In Korea takes viewers on a journey across Korea, showcasing its beauty and diversity through the eyes of both locals and travelers News GenerationNEWs Generation is Arirang TV’s daily news program covering latest trends and current affairs affecting people in their twenties and thirties. Re: SpaceThe show highlights how old or forgotten spaces are reimagined and transformed through creativity, community, and innovation. (1Day 1K-culture) is a daily series of cultural programs designed to bring viewers closer to the everyday cultures of Korea. Heritage Walks With FriendA cultural heritage walk accompanied by Maltese Byeol-yi and Yorkshire Terrier Kka-mi. Produced to offer information including walk tips and precautions to those who intend to visit national heritage with their pets. Trip In KoreaTrip In Korea takes viewers on a journey across Korea, showcasing its beauty and diversity through the eyes of both locals and travelers PerformArts ReloadWe are delighted to help you open your eyes to the new dynamics of K-culturesAndarts, offering a variety of artsy stages in gugak, classical music, musicals, opera and traditional dance. Life GambleLIFE GAMBLE is the tale of a simple blacksmith (Kuo Chue) with extraordinary martial-arts skills who is entangled in a life-and-death struggle among swordsmen, thieves, con artists, a smooth dagger-slinger (Fu Sheng), a beautiful seductress (Lin Chen-chi) who can kill with her smile, a servant with a deadly whip, an assassin with a golden hairpin, an iron-fisted villain on a murderous rampage, a ruthless gambler with seemingly unlimited funds, and so many more. Invincible ShaolinThree North Shaolin teachers (Lu Feng, Chang Sheng, and Sun Chien) are called on by the Manchus to teach their soldiers and urged to challenge the current South Shaolin teachers. They defeat the South Shaolin teachers and, that night, the head general (Wang Lung Wei) kills the South Shaolin teachers and blames their deaths on the North Shaolin teachers. The South Shaolin master sends more of his pupils, who are killed accidentally by the North Shaolin teachers. He finally sends two more (Wei Pai and Lo Meng) of his students to train with old masters and trains one student (Kuo Chui) himself with the goal of finally defeating the North Shaolin experts. The DelinquentThis film is a coming-of-age tale of the lower-class Hong Kong teens in the 1960s. Wang is the title character, a hotheaded and rebellious teen who is tempted by the dark side. The New Shaolin BoxersInternational favorite Alexander Fu Sheng cemented his stardom in this, the fourth film in his esteemed directors Shaolin series. Fu gives both a great dramatic and kung-fu performance as an honorable carriage driver who finds love and death when he battles particularly homicidal street punks. Emperor Chien LungEmperor Chien Lung goes incognito to mix with his people and understand their needs. He encounters many strange things along the way, including being arrested and nearly beheaded. Who will save him? Magnificent WanderersMillionaire Chu Te-Sa (Chiang) invests his considerable wealth into the rebel movement who are intent on usurping the ruling Mongol powers. His goals are impeded by a lack of support though and the supposed allies he has made in the town are merely eager to get their hands on his money. During an attack where these craven comrades flee, Chu befriends three con-artists who relish the chance to show off their fighting skills. The trio subsequently agree to help Chu in his quest to end Mongol rule and hatch a plan to destroy a major munitions dump. Princess Iron FanThe Monkey King and his gang are confronted by the evil Princess Iron Fan, Madam White Bone and her two sexy sisters, plus a cast of fanciful characters. Return Of The Crazy BumpkinsSequel to the John Lo Mar/Chang Yang original finds immigrant Yeh Feng leaving jail to live with crooked uncle Wang Sha, but his girlfriend Ai Ti has married an abusive husband. King DrummerLing Yun plays the replacement hired for a popular band whose egotistic drummer quit to join a rival group. Puppy LoveThis is a story of adolescent playfulness and innocence lost. Two best friends grow up together, but rivalry intervenes when they discover boys! Death ValleyA hired killer unknowingly makes friends with the man hes been sent to assassinate. When The Clouds Roll ByA schizophrenic who refuses to believe her pilot lover was killed and believes his death to be a lie created to end their relationship. Flying Guillotine 2The emperors reign of terror expands. Heroic outlaw Ma Teng joins a squad of female rebels, whose leader is torn between family loyalties. Passing FlickersAn amusing insiders look at the Hong Kong film industry from Li Han Hsiang, recreating some of the eras funniest and most surreal stories ripped straight from the gossip. The Long ChaseYueh Hua stars as an assassin who flees after killing a hated prime minister, with Lo Lieh as the relentless imperial guard who pursues him to a remote village being terrorized by bandits. SiletSilet I Love LolantoSmall-time conman and mechanic Lolanto finds himself in trouble when he cheats gangster Yu Yan Tat out of his high-end sports car on a three-day loan, where new sparkplugs would have sufficed. UnbeatableFai, once a world champion in boxing, escapes to Macau from the loan sharks and unexpectedly encounters Qi, a young chap who is determined to win a boxing match. BewitchedAn actor tries to convince a lady to play Samantha in an adaptation of the classic TV series, but unbeknownst to him, she really is a witch! Prince CharmingChen Li Pin, the nerdy son of a business tycoon, and his friend seek love in Hawaii. Returning home in disappointment, they accidentally find themselves in a messy identity swap. Oily ManiacA frustrated young man afflicted with polio works as a paralegal for a corrupt lawyer. He gets passed onto him the technique for a strange power by a dying man, which turns him into an oil based superhero/villain. Legend Of The Fist: Chen ZhenThe year is 1917 and Chen Zhen, believed to be dead, returns to Shanghai under a false name. He joins a mob boss for info on the Japanese incl. a long kill list and at night fights the Japanese masked. Painted FaceAn action-thriller centered on a vampire-like woman who eats the skins and hearts of her lovers. Casino Tycoon 2Inspired by the story of Macau’s Casino King Stanley Ho, the movie traces his blood-splattered fight to the top from 1930s to 1960s. In 1941, a young graduate, Benny Ho, flees Hong Kong during the Japanese invasion and heads for Macau. Benny starts as a labourer but rises to the top of the city’s casino business with his courage, wisdom and diligence. ImpermanenceA series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Justice, My Foot!Chow stars as Sung, a lawyer who uses any means necessary to help his wealthy clients escape the law. Sung retires to the countryside when urged by his wife, but when Mrs Sung encounters a woman whose husbands death has been covered up by corrupted officials, Sung returns to the court for justice to be served. The Story Of My SonLi Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks. Kungfu StuntmenThe documentary highlights renowned Chinese Kung Fu masters in the film industry, showcasing Hong Kongs Kung Fu legacy over sixty years and capturing their daring lives. Zombie IslandJeff goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures but turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped and are attacked by the zombies! Gangster, The Cop, The DevilDetective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. His pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan. When Fortune SmilesThe head of a rich family dies and in his will leaves his fortune to his daughter. His son is enraged and uses a rubbish collector who looks the same as his sister to steal the fortune. The Uncles son also wants a piece of the fortune and coerces a small time thief into stealing the will for his wild scheme. HeroMa Wing Jing and his older brother Ma Tai Chueng arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune. Be-friending a powerful mobster Wing Jing is given his nightclub in return for saving Tam Sei’s life. Unfortunately, another Gangster wants the territory a well. The Mighty Peking ManA greedy Hong Kong businessman hires a young hunter to capture a giant gorilla said to live deep in the Indian jungle. The hunter finds the ape, and living with it he finds a feral human female who has befriended the creature. Lets Make Laugh 2The cheating husband goes bankrupt, and his house is soon to be taken by the government. A security guard is assigned to guard it while the husband goes missing. However, only the mistress stays alone in the house. Will the lonely, handsome guard and the heartbroken mistress hook up? Fight Back To School 2Sing quits the force after getting demoted to traffic duties, while his partner is assigned a mission involving foreign terrorists threatening to bomb a school in Hong Kong, so Sing decides to help by going undercover at the same school. The Monkey Is BackStone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl. But Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Endless LoveA young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend. Drunken MasterWong Fei-Hung is a mischievous, yet righteous young man, but after a series of incidents, his frustrated father has him disciplined by a master of drunken martial arts. The Case Of DisappearancesWhen Qing Cheng was a teenager, he was attacked by an unknown mutant monster and lost his family and memory. He was regarded by the villagers as an ominous person who would bring disaster. Ip ManDuring the Japanese invasion of China, a wealthy martial artist is forced to leave his home when his city is occupied. With little means of providing for themselves, Ip Man and the remaining members of the city must find a way to survive. Perfect GirlsChi will inherit his dying grandfathers fortune with one condition, he has to be married in a month, otherwise the money goes to his uncle, Robert. NezhaA former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team, can they team up to regain teams glory? Cop Shop BabesIsland East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case? Shark BustersDuring the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization. Love On DeliveryA delivery boy Yin wants to impress his dream girl Li, so he enrols in a martial arts course to learn strange moves. Being timid, Yin saves Li while wearing a Garfield mask but the credit is stolen by Karate Master, Liu. To prove himself and win Li back, Yin defeats Liu in the ring with his unique martial arts move Invincible Wind and Fire Spin. Aerial China S3, Ep 10Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental affecting lives nationwide. Between Heaven And Earth, Ep 12Between Heaven And Earth, Ep 12 Bond Of Friendship, Ep 2The Communist Party of China (CPC) concluded its 20th National Congress in late October, marking a landmark period for Chinas development. CPC delegates reviewed achievements, voted for top leadership and deliberated on Chinas path forward to becoming a modern socialist country by 2050. Nankai: A School..., Ep 2During the Two Sessions which have just concluded, issues related to accelerating the modernization of education and building the country into a strong educational power drew broad discussions and attention from across the country. US Squawk BoxSquawk Box is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Squawk On The StreetThe host presents the most significant updates and developments from the first 90 minutes of trading in the US stock market. Money MoversMoney Movers is a highly active program focusing on whats moving the stock markets, and setting the agenda for the business day. Halftime ReportHalftime Report is on the front lines of CNBCs market coverage. Host CNBCs Scott Wapner and the Streets top investors get to the heart of the action. The ExchangeThe Exchange is the newsroom-based program for todays Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories. Power LunchPower Lunch delves into the economy, markets, politics, real estate, media, technology and more. The show sits at the intersection of power and money. Closing BellExperts guide viewers through the most vital hour of the trading day and analyse how the markets are progressing, the factors moving the markets and the reactions of the investors. Closing Bell: OvertimeDuring “Closing Bell: Overtime,” Morgan Brennan and Jon Fortt take you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading, and Michael Santoli provides daily markets insights throughout the program. Fast Money“Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors. U.S. Markets EditionU.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBCs programming in the US. Squawk Box Asia (L)Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers. The China ConnectionAnchored by Emily Tan, The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of Chinas economy, markets, and its relationship with the global landscape. Inside IndiaAnchored by Sri Jegarajah, CNBCs Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse businesses, and the people behind its rise. Access Middle EastAccess Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions. Europe Early EditionWith breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the days session. With in-depth narration, the documentary explores the impact of this transformation on local residents and the vision to make Kalijodo a symbol of positive urban change. Evil Up Close S6, Ep 7Dubbed the vampire killer, teen Mathew Hardman thought that taking a life would make him immortal. His victim was an elderly neighbour. After stabbing her, he removed her heart and drank her blood. Cold Case Files: DNA, Ep 5Examines cold cases that are solved through advancements in DNA, along with help from victims families, law enforcement and the public. Booked: First Day In S1, Ep 4Following people who get arrested and get booked into the system. What it feels like top be arrested, finger printed and appear in front of judge to see if they will get bonded. City Confidential S8, Ep 12City Confidential features real life stories in a wide variety of American cities. While many of these stories deal with murder, some also deal with attempted murder, and public officials caught in compromising situations, among other things. The Garden City ButcherPretending to be a friendly tourist in Singapore, he targeted unsuspecting travelers. Interrogation Raw S3, Ep 3Following the discovery of a womans body in a neighborhood dumpster, investigators narrow down their suspect list to three people; the list includes two brothers. Interrogation Raw S3, Ep 4Telling the stories of dramatic murders and other serious crimes through the interrogation of the accused, intercut with interviews with key players along with relevant news footage and archival material, including trial footage. OutnumberedA news show featuring the top headlines of the day, from pop culture to politics, with a panel of four women vs. one man. America ReportsTook over the 1pm-3pm ET time slots from Outnumbered Overtime with Harris Faulkner (2017) and The Daily Briefing with Dana Perino (2017), with Faulkner beginning her new show The Faulkner Focus (2021) at 11am ET and Perino becoming co-anchor of Americas Newsroom (2007) from 9am-11am ET. The Taking Of Pelham 123 (Galaxy Premium)Armed men hijack a New York City subway train, holding the passengers hostage in return for a ransom, and turning an ordinary days work for dispatcher Walter Garber into a face-off with the mastermind behind the crime. Tears Of The Sun (Galaxy Premium)A Special-Ops commander leads his team into the Nigerian jungle in order to rescue a doctor who will only join them if they agree to save 70 refugees too. Bad Santa 2 (Galaxy Premium)Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie teams up once again with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Black And BlueA rookie New Orleans police officer is forced to balance her identity as a black woman after she witnesses two corrupt cops committing murder. The Italian JobProfessional safecracker John Bridgers team have plans to steal $35 million worth of gold bullion from a safe in Venice from Italian gangsters who had stolen it weeks earlier. Professional fixer Charlie Croker, computer expert Lyle or Napster, wheelman Handsome Rob, inside man Steve, and explosives expert Left Ear comprise the team. Although the heist is successful, Steve double-crosses them as they drive towards Austria with the bullion. With another crew he takes it for himself and kills John. Rob drives the van over the bridge into the water to protect the others, using air tanks from the heist to stay alive. Steve leaves them for dead Bad SantaA miserable conman and his partner pose as Santa and his Little Helper to rob department stores on Christmas Eve. But they run into problems when the conman befriends a troubled kid. Resident Evil: VendettaChris Redfield enlists the help of Leon S. Kennedy and Rebecca Chambers to stop a death merchant from spreading a deadly virus in New York. Ghost RiderWhen motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his fathers life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devils own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners. Thats My BoyWhile in his teens, Donny fathered a son, Todd, and raised him as a single parent until Todds 18th birthday. The IntrudersAfter the traumatic loss of her mother, a teenaged girl tries to uncover the dark secrets behind her new home, in spite of her fathers disbelief. Daddys Home 2Having finally gotten used to each others existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays. Jumanji: The Next Level (Galaxy Premium)The gang is back but the game has changed. As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unexplored, to escape the worlds most dangerous game. The Bounty HunterA bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife, a reporter working on a murder cover-up. Soon after their reunion, the duo find themselves on a run-for-their-lives adventure to Las Vegas. Ghost In The ShellIn the near future, Major Mira Killian is the first of her kind: A human saved from a terrible crash, who is cyber-enhanced to be a perfect soldier devoted to stopping the worlds most dangerous criminals. JumanjiWhen two children play an old board-game, they release a man trapped in it for decades and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game. The Lovely Bones (Galaxy Premium)Centers on a young girl who has been murdered and watches over her family - and her killer - from purgatory. She must weigh her desire for vengeance against her desire for her family to heal. The Fog (Galaxy Premium)A thick mist full of vengeful spirits haunts a prosperous island town off the coast of Oregon, as its inhabitants try to learn their towns dark secret in order to stop it. Terminator SalvationSet in post-apocalyptic 2018, John Connor is the man fated to lead the human resistance against Skynet and its army of Terminators. Eagle EyeTwo strangers, Jerry and Rachel, drawn together by a mysterious woman. They must work together to stop a deadly plot orchestrated by an unknown force. The Taking Of Pelham 123Armed men hijack a New York City subway train, holding the passengers hostage in return for a ransom, and turning an ordinary days work for dispatcher Walter Garber into a face-off with the mastermind behind the crime. The Legend Of ZorroDespite trying to keep his swashbuckling to a minimum, a threat to Californias pending statehood causes the adventure-loving Don Alejandro de la Vega and his wife, Elena, to take action. Tears Of The SunA Special-Ops commander leads his team into the Nigerian jungle in order to rescue a doctor who will only join them if they agree to save 70 refugees too. Black And BlueA rookie New Orleans police officer is forced to balance her identity as a black woman after she witnesses two corrupt cops committing murder. The ForestAn American woman enters Japans legendary Suicide Forest in search for her twin sister, who has mysteriously disappeared. Last Vegas (Galaxy Premium)Billy, Paddy, Archie and Sam have been best friends since childhood. When Billy proposes to his much-younger girlfriend, they go to Vegas to relive their glory days. However, the decades have changed Sin City and tested their friendship. Minority ReportJohn works with the PreCrime police which stop crimes before they take place, with the help of three PreCogs who can foresee crimes. Events ensue when John finds himself framed for a future murder. The Company You KeepAfter a journalist discovers his identity, a former Weather Underground activist goes on the run. The Pig FarmerAward-winning investigation into the crimes of Robert Pickton. This documentary explores why it took so many years to capture and convict Canadas most prolific serial killer. Troubling revelations about who knew what, and when. MissionaryA Mormon missionary becomes dangerously unhinged after his lover ends their brief affair to go back to her estranged husband. Room 203Two best friends and roommates are terrified by the vengeful spirits dwelling in their apartment. Based on the novel published by Kobunsha and written by Nanami Kamon. No Mans LandWhen a vigilante border patrol turns fatal, a man flees on horseback to Mexico, seeking forgiveness from the victims father. RevivalOne miraculous day in rural Wisconsin the deceased rise from their graves, yet appear and act unchanged. And now it is up to Officer and single mother Dana Cypress to solve a murder case where everyone, alive or undead, is a suspect. The CanyonsWhen Christian, an LA trust-fund kid with casual ties to Hollywood, learns of a secret affair between Tara and Ryan, he spirals out of control, and his cruel mind games escalate into an act of bloody violence. Empire StateTwo childhood friends plan to rob an armoured car depository, but an NYPD officer stands in their way. SkinA destitute young man, raised by racist skinheads and notorious among white supremacists, turns his back on hatred and violence to transform his life, with the help of a black activist and the woman he loves. Dont Kill ItAn ancient demon terrorizes a tiny Mississippi town. Holy Ghost PeopleTo find her sister, a young woman hires an alcoholic ex-Marine to help her infiltrate the Pentecostal Church of One Accord. Play DeadChloe fakes her own death to steal evidence from a morgue. The Coroner uses the morgue as a front for a sick and twisted business. Then, Chloe learns more about the dead than she bargains for. Edge Of FearAfter being stabbed in the heart by ruthless home invaders, a man is left for dead. Now weak, outnumbered, and knife sticking from his chest, he attempts to do the impossible: save his wife from these murderers before he bleeds to death. Force Of ExecutionA crime boss who runs a southwestern town needs the help of his former hit-man to deal with a new threat to his empire. The Spiderwick ChroniclesUpon moving into the run-down Spiderwick Estate with their mother, twin brothers Jared and Simon Grace, along with their sister Mallory, find themselves pulled into an alternate world full of faeries and other creatures. First LoveThe story is described as a poignant look at a young mans difficult entry into adulthood. Another Mothers SonLou lives on the Nazi-occupied Island of Jersey during World War 2. She accepts to hide a young Russian POW at her house at the risk of being imprisoned herself and takes care of him as if he was her own son. The Colombian Connection1976 is a dangerous year in the Straits of Yucatan. Jack Hooks, a former cop set up by his corrupt partner is sent to jail for a drug crime he didnt commit. Crime StoryAn old man suffering from cancer seeks revenge on the thieves who have destroyed his life. Murder SyndicateWhen the matriarch of a family of assassins falls ill, her three children and younger boyfriend fight among themselves to take over her empire. Elizabeth HarvestElizabeth arrives with her brilliant scientist husband Henry to his magnificent estate. Henry explains that everything in his world now belongs to her, all except for a locked-off room he forbids her from entering. After Ever HappyAs a shocking truth about a couples families emerges, the two lovers discover they are not so different from each other. The Company You KeepAfter a journalist discovers his identity, a former Weather Underground activist goes on the run. The Pig FarmerAward-winning investigation into the crimes of Robert Pickton. This documentary explores why it took so many years to capture and convict Canadas most prolific serial killer. Troubling revelations about who knew what, and when. After We FellJust as Tessa makes the biggest decision of her life, everything changes. Revelations about her family, and then Hardins, throw everything they knew before in doubt and makes their future together more difficult. The Journey Is The DestinationPhotographer Dan Eldon, was only 22 when he was killed by an angry mob in Somalia. He left behind 17 scrapbooks that held his art, chronicling his life from age 14. The Fourth StateA German journalist investigating the Russian secret service gets caught up in a terrorist plot in Moscow. Love You Love You Not (IMC)A romantic comedy about Amira, an English tutor, who teaches English to Juki, a hot-tempered Betawi guy, so he can follow his girlfriend to America. Sang PencerahThe story follows K.H. Ahmad Dahlan, an Indonesian hero who fights to build Muhammadiyah, facing resistance from society as he challenges old views and inspires a new way of thinking. MangkujiwoA young woman is pulled into a chilling web of rituals, betrayal, and bloodlines connected to an ancient mirror. As dark forces awaken, the boundary between past and present begins to shatter. Pulau Hantu 2Dante is again trapped in Ghost Island. Alongside Nero, they struggle to get out from the island. Whilst trying to get out, they meet 9 people who are making a rave party on the island. Cas Cis CusAstris mother demands angrily for a porn-video cassette that embarrasses the son-in-law Dedi, and the two grandchildren. In desperation, she runs away from home. Pulau HantuEight teenagers are set to sail for a holiday. However, the yacht has to leave them in a private small island with a single resort. The island keeps a ghostly secret that starts to prey their lives one by one. GaneshaGanesha tries to make his fortune in the city under influence of his friends. On the way, he managed to thwart a hijacking on the bus he was riding. The driver thanked him and raised him as his child. Menggapai Matahari 2This sequel of Menggapai Matahari continues the rivalry between Rhoma Irama and Beny Compo. Not only want to destroy Rhoma Iramas music career, Beny also want to physically harm him. Dunia MerekaFor Filly, the guitar substitutes for her mother who was killed in a plane crash. Her talent and taste in music makes her joined the band Capung Biru and met Ivan Bramono. Mencari HilalMahmud, a devoted elder, longs to revive a fading tradition to prove faith is not about wealth. His path collides with his estranged son, sparking an unexpected journey of belief, ideals, and reconciliation. Si Manis Jembatan AncolMaryam, a woman who are looking for happiness when her love life with Roy is in the verge of destruction. The presence of Yudha are able to make Maryam calm. But, a tragedy happened. Lutung KasarungGuruminda wants a wife who is as beautiful as his mother, but he is cursed by his own mother to become Lutung Kasarung, who will turn into a human again, when there is a woman who loves him. Membakar MatahariYanti married by Rachman and receives martial arts lesson from his grandfather to take revenge on the robbers and the pimp who trapped her in prostitution. Cewek GokilKeke works very hard in order to buy a Mini Cooper, the car of her dream. However, her hard work is causing some distance between herself and the people she loves. NazarCindy vows to marry Jajat, a geeky ketoprak seller who happens to pass by, if she wins a luxury car from the bottle cap lottery. Then Cindy really wins the luxury car but is now desperate to cancel her impulsive vow. 5 Cowok Jagoan (IMC)5 lifelong friends attempt to rescue a damsel in distress from gangsters and zombies in this action packed comedy. Cowok Bikin PusingThis movie tells the story about a pair of young love who once hurt by their former lovers. They finally fall in love and must overcome obstacles threatening their relationship. SoekarnoFrom fragile beginnings to fiery orations, a man named Soekarno rises with an unshakable spirit. Love, sacrifice, and bold visions shape his journey, as destiny pushes him closer to a nation’s long-awaited awakening. Pulau Hantu 3Madara Island has reopened with a new owner and the island soon becomes a popular destination for young vacationers. However, people begin to disappear and Nero must set out to find out what is going on. Kanan Kiri OK 2Silly things start to happen when Tati is determined to be a movie star after learning that Anita and Rio, her neighbours, are about to star in a movie. Giliran Saya ManaA young couple decided to elope because the womans parents only want their child to marry a rich person. The problem started when they decided to pretend to be rich and borrowed a luxury house from their friend. Nada-Nada RinduRamlan envies Rhomas success and tries to sabotage his career. Rhomas career is shattered, forcing him to start all over again. KangenTwo lovebirds separated by fate, and has to deal with a heartbreaking feeling of longing for each other. Love You Love You NotA romantic comedy about Amira, an English tutor, who teaches English to Juki, a hot-tempered Betawi guy, so he can follow his girlfriend to America. Sang PencerahThe story follows K.H. Ahmad Dahlan, an Indonesian hero who fights to build Muhammadiyah, facing resistance from society as he challenges old views and inspires a new way of thinking. MangkujiwoA young woman is pulled into a chilling web of rituals, betrayal, and bloodlines connected to an ancient mirror. As dark forces awaken, the boundary between past and present begins to shatter. Baby BluesTaking care a baby is not an easy work for Andika and Dinda. It makes Dinda experiences baby blues syndrome. Debates and quarrels happen. Finally, a miracle happens and their bodies are switched. HumanLike: Chimps Of FongoliHumanLike: The Chimps of Fongoli takes a look at how a group of chimpanzees has adapted to survive in an extreme environment in Senegal, on the southern edge of the Sahara Desert. The film traces the 25-year story of how American primatologist Jill Preutz and local chimp expert Dondo “Johnny” Kante got close to the chimps and uncovered their unique behaviors that might just reveal secrets about humans’ own evolutionary past. Fun, relatable stories set to toe-tapping songs. KikoKiko tells of a child of a goldfish who is very independent, even though he is an only child. Kiko who is always cheerful has four good friends, namely Lola the discus fish, Ting Ting the crab, Patino the catfish and Poli the betta fish. On the other hand, the antagonists, Karkus the catfish and Pupus the eel, always make Kikos life chaotic. One day, the lake where Kiko lives is polluted due to the reckless acts of humans, causing Kiko and friends to turn into mutants. The Winning Meals Of Great...What kind of meals did the great generals and people who made their marks on history eat? The MarsupilamisThe legendary Marsupilamis swap the wild Palombian jungle for an even wilder place: the city. There, twins Jade and Mica find their world turned upside down when their explorer parents entrust them with three mysterious Marsupilami eggs. Once they hatch, the siblings must get creative to keep their new friends hidden after all, no one knows these energetic creatures exist, and predators could be lurking around every corner. Northern BordersNorthern Borders tells the story of ten year-old Austen Kittredge who is sent by his father to live on his grandparents Vermont farm, where he experiences wild adventures and uncovers long-festering family secrets. Its 1956 and Austen experiences the farm as a place full of eccentric people, especially his stubborn grandparents whose thorny marriage is known as the Forty Years War. Initially feeling stuck in this fractured household, young Austen plans a quick exit but ends up stranded with no choice but to navigate and endure. A humorous and sometimes startling coming-of-age-story, Northern Borders evokes Vermonts wildness, its sublime beauty, a haunted past, and an aura of enchantment. Terikat Janji (RCTI)Davina is hurt by a betrayal in love, leaving her life in ruins. She then enters into a fake relationship with Sena. Over time, their feelings become real, but they must face hidden secrets and complicated family conflicts. Turun Ranjang (RCTI)Diagnosed with cancer, Olivia matches her husband Raka with Renata for their children. When she recovers, she must choose: reclaim her love or let go for their happiness. Kompleks Pengabdi IstriKompleks Pengabdi Istri Preman PensiunBahar retired as a thug because before his wife died, his wife said she would wait for him in heaven. His right-hand man, Muslihat, takes over power and shares of Bahar, causing conflict. Penyejuk HatiPenyejuk Hati Upin IpinUpin Ipin Entong (RCTI)The Entong animated series tells the story of the daily life of a Betawi boy named Entong in a village. Entongs daily life involves exciting and funny competitions with two boys his age named Memed and Tibo. Mega Film TVMega Film TV on RCTI showcases top movie picks weekly, offering action, drama, and thrilling adventures for the whole family to enjoy together. Go Spot (RCTI)An infotainment show that presents celebrity news as it is—without embellishment, exaggeration, or sensationalism. Seputar iNews SiangA news program that airs every afternoon, delivering the facts as they are, without fabrication, and presenting the latest and most current news. Si Doel Anak Sekolahan S2Si Doel Anak Sekolahan S2 My Dear GuardianA story that follows a warm and gentle military medic and the ice mountain military officer as they fulfill their duties and also find love. Fist From Shaolin (Rock Action)Wong Fei Hong (Wong Kwan) must fight against slave trader Master Eleven (Ji Chun Hua) and Prefect Wu to stop the Chinese being sold as slaves to work in the gold mines in America. The Hateful Eight (Rock Action)In the dead of a Wyoming winter, a bounty hunter and his prisoner find shelter in a cabin currently inhabited by a collection of nefarious characters. Around The World In 80 DaysPhileas Fogg is an inventor and believes he can travel around the world in 80 days. Accompanying him are his loyal manservant, Passepartout, and Monique, a beautiful navigator. The Hunger Games: Catching FireKatniss Everdeen and Peeta Mellark become targets of the Capitol after their victory in the 74th Hunger Games sparks a rebellion in the Districts of Panem. The Librarian: Judas ChaliceLosing his girlfriend because he was at an auction getting the magical Philosophers Stone, Flynn Carsen is ordered to take a vacation. In New Orleans he finds himself busy protecting the Judas Chalice and saving the world from vampires. Rambo: First Blood, Pt 2Ex-Green Beret goes on a reconnaissance mission to spring MIAs from a Viet Cong prison. The Hunger GamesKatniss Everdeen voluntarily takes her younger sisters place in the Hunger Games: a televised competition in which two teenagers from each of the twelve Districts of Panem are chosen at random to fight to the death. The Hunger Games: Catching FireKatniss Everdeen and Peeta Mellark become targets of the Capitol after their victory in the 74th Hunger Games sparks a rebellion in the Districts of Panem. The Triangle, Pt 1Shipping magnate hires a journalist, an oceanographer, a psychic and a meteorologist to find out why some of his ships went missing in the Bermuda Triangle. The survivor of one such incident realizes that his reality has altered. The Triangle, Pt 2The team is taken in by the men in black and later released. Howard and Stan search for the plane crash survivors grandfather, while Bruce and Emily look for the source of the anomalies in the Triangle. Confused Meeno becomes suicidal. The Triangle, Pt 3U.S. Secretary of the Navy has found a way to stop the Triangle phenomena. With their job done, the team goes home only to realize that a possible miscalculation in his plan could bring about the end of the world. Can the team stop it? Rambo: First Blood, Pt 2 (Rock Action)Ex-Green Beret goes on a reconnaissance mission to spring MIAs from a Viet Cong prison. Meteor, Pt 1Asteroid Kassandra nears Earth. Imogen struggles to deliver data, while Jack is framed and his daughter kidnapped. Amid global chaos, the military races to stop disaster. Meteor, Pt 2A deadly debris storm devastates Earth as Imogen warns the threat isn’t over. With communications down, Jack hunts a killer while a nuclear crisis pushes everyone to survive. Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1 (Rock Action)Katniss Everdeen is in District 13 after she shatters the games forever. Under the leadership of President Coin and the advice of her trusted friends, Katniss spreads her wings as she fights to save Peeta and a nation moved by her courage. WantedRadhe is a ruthless gangster who will kill anyone for money. He is attracted towards Jhanvi, a middle class girl, who does not approve of his work and wants him to change. The Librarian: Quest For SpearA bookworm becomes the librarian. Same night a magical spear gets stolen and hes off to get some real life experience around the globe on his quest for the spear - starting with being thrown off a plane over Amazonas by his cute helper. The Mummy (1999)In ancient Egypt, a forbidden love sparks a deadly betrayal that seals a priest in a cursed tomb. Decades later in 1926, explorers uncover the site and accidentally revive him, forcing them to fight an ancient evil rising again in the desert. Mortal Engines (Studio Universal)In a post-apocalyptic world where cities ride on wheels and consume each other to survive, two people meet in London and try to stop a conspiracy. MadagascarA group of animals who have spent all their life in a New York zoo end up in the jungles of Madagascar, and must adjust to living in the wild. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? 3AM, Ep 4A group of friends going on a camping trip inside a haunted forest encounters a series of paranormal events. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive? A Woman ScornedA woman takes revenge on the men that murdered her sister in cold blood, hunting them down one by one in a bloody massacre. AU BOUT DE LENQUÊTE, LA FIN DU CRIME PARFAIT ?Au Bout de l’Enquete, la Fin du Crime Parfait ? revisits famous criminal cases, analyzing mistakes, breakthroughs, and investigations that led to uncovering the truth. LE JOURNAL DE FRANCE 2The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time). MEURTRES À CHARTRESMeurtres à Chartres follows detectives as they investigate a mysterious killing linked to the rich history of Chartres. As clues emerge, the case uncovers hidden secrets tied to the city’s past, leading to a complex and suspenseful resolution. FOOT! (1/2)Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonalds, the French football championship. FOOT! (2/2)Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonalds, the French football championship. LÉTOILE FILANTELÉtoile Filante tells the story of individuals whose lives intersect through surprising circumstances. Combining humor and heartfelt moments, the narrative explores dreams, regrets, and second chances. AU-DELÀ DES MURSAu-delà des Murs portrays individuals overcoming walls—both literal and metaphorical—through resilience, solidarity, and personal transformation. SIX DEGRÉSSIX DEGRÉS follows the intertwined lives of individuals whose destinies collide after a shocking event. As secrets unravel and relationships are tested, the story explores how a single decision can connect strangers in profound and life-changing ways. MAGHREB-ORIENT EXPRESSMaghreb-Orient Express explores cultures, history, and daily life across North Africa and the Middle East, offering insight into traditions, people, and regional connections. 64 ACTU64 Actu delivers in-depth coverage of national and international news, combining reports, analysis, and expert commentary to provide context behind the headlines. 64 DÉBAT64 Debat brings journalists, experts, and commentators together to discuss key political, social, and economic topics shaping today’s world. LINVITÉPatrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times. LITTORALLittoral examines coastal ecosystems, marine life, and human interaction with shorelines, emphasizing conservation and environmental awareness. C DANS LAIRAll the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! CHRONIQUES DEN HAUTChroniques d’en Haut presents breathtaking landscapes and human stories from mountainous areas, focusing on nature, heritage, and resilient communities. UN SI GRAND SOLEILThe Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web. BIEN BÂTIBIEN BÂTI explores the art of building, focusing on architects, engineers, and craftsmen dedicated to sustainable and durable design. BIEN BÂTIBIEN BÂTI explores the art of building, focusing on architects, engineers, and craftsmen dedicated to sustainable and durable design. Through site visits and interviews, the film highlights innovation, heritage techniques, and environmental responsibility. CHRONIQUES DEN HAUTChroniques d’en Haut presents breathtaking landscapes and human stories from mountainous areas, focusing on nature, heritage, and resilient communities. LAFRIK EN CONTESLAFRIK EN CONTES brings to life traditional African tales through colorful animation and engaging storytelling. Each episode shares moral lessons, humor, and cultural heritage, introducing young audiences to legendary characters and timeless wisdom passed down through generations. LA PETITE POKOULa Petite Pokou recounts a legendary story of a young princess faced with an impossible decision to save her people. The tale highlights themes of bravery, sacrifice, and leadership rooted in cultural heritage. IL ÉTAIT UNE FOIS... CES DRÔLES DOBJETSWatches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history? LES NOUVELLES AVENTURES DE KAELOOIn Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next! OUM LE DAUPHIN BLANCOUM LE DAUPHIN BLANC follows young Yann and his loyal white dolphin, Oum, as they protect the marine world from threats and uncover island mysteries. Set in tropical waters, the series blends friendship, environmental awareness, and thrilling adventures for young audiences. OUM LE DAUPHIN BLANCOUM LE DAUPHIN BLANC follows young Yann and his loyal white dolphin, Oum, as they protect the marine world from threats and uncover island mysteries. Set in tropical waters, the series blends friendship, environmental awareness, and thrilling adventures for young audiences. UN SI GRAND SOLEILThe Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web. LE JOURNAL DE FRANCE 2The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time). LA VOLANTELa Volante tells the story of a woman whose life becomes entangled with a controlling employer. As tension builds, manipulation and psychological pressure lead to a gripping and unpredictable narrative. FOREIGNERSForeigners explores the lives of individuals living away from their homeland, dealing with identity, belonging, and cultural differences. Their journeys reflect emotional struggles and the search for acceptance. MA GUEULEMA GUEULE offers an unfiltered look at individuals confronting stereotypes and societal labels. Through personal testimonies and intimate storytelling, the film highlights the struggle for dignity, authenticity, and acceptance in modern society. ALEX HUGOAlex Hugo follows a former city police officer who now lives in a remote mountain region, solving complex criminal cases while seeking peace from his past. The series combines mystery, action, and emotional depth against stunning natural backdrops. TENDANCE XXIThe restoration of Notre-Dame de Paris: a fabulous architectural adventure. MEURTRES À MONT-DE-MARSANMeurtres à Mont-de-Marsan follows detectives as they investigate a mysterious killing in a quiet town. As secrets emerge, the case reveals hidden tensions and dark pasts among the residents. MamaMama follows three different families all dealing with different issues affecting their mothers. Dong-Sook (Uhm Jung-Hwa) is a single mother who works as a saleswoman for yogurt drinks and also works cleans apartments to make ends meet. Her world revolves around her son Won-Jae (Lee Hyung-Suk), who is afflicted with a disease that prevents him from walking. One day, Dong-Sook is diagnosed with cancer and her world comes crashing down. Eun-Sung (Ryu Hyun-Kyung) has always lived under the shadows of her famous opera singer mother Hee-Kyung (Jeon Su-Kyeong). But, a visit to her sisters house in Manhattan changes everything. Song FillersEnjoy Bollywood songs presented by Zee Bioskop! Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki JaanThe eldest brother refuses to marry since he believes it may create disharmony in his big family. His brothers, whove already found partners, come together to find a match for him. LoveYatri: A Journey Of LoveSushrut who runs a garba academy falls in love with a beautiful NRI, Michelle, but her father creates a rift between the two. However, Sushrut is determined to win her back. Khiladi 786A marriage bureau owner sees his son as a disappointment. Determined to prove his worth, the son takes on a wild challenge: finding the perfect match for a gangsters sister, diving into chaos and unexpected turns along the way.
